programme.desc: Chris Cuomo speaks with Paris Lee Bennet to find out why he killed his sister.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: The Killer Twins
programme.desc: Chris Cuomo tries to find answers to the age-old question of nature versus nurture, asking if the desire to kill could be a genetic trait.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files: With Every Breath
programme.desc: Investigators race to figure out what killed a couple on an Indian reservation in New Mexico, and discover that it was the dried feces of deer mice, which had become airborne and deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Cheater
programme.desc: Little did Walter Scott of the band 'Bob Kuban and the In-Men' know that their 1966 hit-single 'The Cheater' would foreshadow the events that would lead to his demise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Forever Hold Your Peace
programme.desc: When a young man confessed to the rape and murder of a woman in a restaurant, police were convinced the case was solved. Eight years later, another man imprisoned for an unrelated crime, admitted he committed the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bitter Pill to Swallow
programme.desc: A pregnant woman experiences severe morning sickness and suspects something is amiss.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot
programme.desc: Illinois police discover a footprint on a birthday card that could lead to the home invader who killed a man and attacked two young girls.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: The murder of a prominent businessman in Colorado is particularly difficult to solve since the killers left virtually no forensic evidence at the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Big Chill
programme.desc: When a woman dies after a long illness, investigators have to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide, or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bound for Jail
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in a ravine, police are stuck, as any evidence was washed away by storms. 20 years after the fact, an old hat and a tiny chip of metal put investigators back on the trail of a case long gone cold.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: Summer Of Terror (Part 1)
programme.desc: The summer of 1985 was one of the hottest Los Angeles had seen in a century. But terrified residents weren't sleeping with the windows open, they weren't sleeping at all. A killer was on the loose. He was the Night Stalker.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: I WIll Be Avenged (Part 2)
programme.desc: A tip from a teenage boy leads to the identity of the Night Stalker. Twenty-four hours later a mob of angry citizens track him down and capture him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold
programme.desc: When a Massachusetts man dropped dead of an apparent heart attack, no one thought foul play was a possibility until police looked into his girlfriend’s odd behavior in the days before his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Music Case
programme.desc: The sense of security in Waseca, Minnesota shatters when 12-year-old Cally Jo Larson is found dead in her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Paintball
programme.desc: In 1962, the people of the small town of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15 year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered. It would take 24 years to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign Here
programme.desc: A young woman walked out of a department store, got into a rental car, and was never seen again. The signature on the rental car agreement turned out to be a forgery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cats, Flies and Snapshots
programme.desc: A 19-year-old Pennsylvania woman disappears on her way to work leaving behind her infant son, a family who loves her, and a job she enjoys. Police investigators view this case as a missing person/ possible homicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naked Justice
programme.desc: The 29-year-old, pregnant wife of a young, successful attorney is found dead in her Michigan home of a gunshot wound to the head. Blood spatter analysis and a painstaking investigation led police to the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision

programme.title: Forensic Files: With Every Breath

programme.desc: When a Yale student mysteriously vanishes days before her wedding investigators comb a secure research lab for clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Ambush
programme.desc: A mysterious murder in an upscale community is solved by cell phone forensics.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: On the Rocks
programme.desc: The naked body of a young woman is discovered in a remote area leading forensic investigators on a search for clues to her identity and the identity of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Barn
programme.desc: When a popular handyman in a New Hampshire town is found murdered investigators follow forensic clues to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Inside Pocket
programme.desc: An insurance agent is shot execution style in his office in broad daylight but the killer leaves no fingerprints and there is no murder weapon found at the scene. Then, investigators discover a critical clue invisible to the naked eye.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Killer Snapshot
programme.desc: An amazing new forensic tool turns a cold case around.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Disappearance
programme.desc: When a girl disappears from church, investigators fear a stalker is preying on children.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Photo Finish
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts until a park employee discovers photographs in a trash dumpster. With the photos are some vital pieces of information which eventually lead to a professional photographer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Whodunit
programme.desc: An evening out to a murder mystery theatre turns into a real life whodunit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Horse Play
programme.desc: A young, happily married woman died tragically in a horseback riding accident. Her husband seemed far from grief-stricken and, when they investigated his background, police discovered a web of lies and a proficiency with pharmaceuticals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Proof
programme.desc: Investigates the worst arson spree in U.S. history which occurred in Seattle.

programme.title: Forensic Files: X Marks the Spot
programme.desc: Can a map tell who a serial killer really is?

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Plummer's Gold
programme.desc: Josh sets off for gold rush country to search for the lost fortune of a notorious Montana sheriff. During his investigation, Josh explores hidden cave systems and blows open a mine that's been sealed for over a century.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: England's Vanished Crown Jewels
programme.desc: Josh goes on a quest to find the legendary lost treasure of King John. He explores the deadly marshlands of England to find the despised king's crown jewels, which were swept away in a freak tidal surge in the 13th century.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Nazis in Argentina
programme.desc: Josh ventures to Argentina, where many Nazi SS officers escaped to after World War II.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Corsica's Nazi Treasure
programme.desc: Josh hunts for the hidden treasure of Erwin Rommel, a Nazi general who plundered the wealth of North Africa as his tank corps fled the continent. The search brings Josh to never-explored underground lakes and undersea relics of World War II.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: America's Lost WWII Hero
programme.desc: Josh Gates explores the case of lost World War II hero Gertrude 'Tommy' Tompkins of the Women Air Force Service Pilots, who went missing when her P-51 Mustang crashed. Josh joins search teams using cutting-edge technology to bring the lost hero home.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: The Loch Ness Conspiracy
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade chases new leads in pursuit of the Loch Ness Monster's hiding place. Using the latest evidence and state-of-the-art science, experts might finally reveal the truth behind this legendary monster.

programme.title: River Monsters: Return of the Killer Catfish
programme.desc: Jeremy journeys to Nepal where rumours of a deadly man-eating catfish have surfaced, and tries to determine if the Goonch has returned, or if a new monster is on the loose.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Corsica's Nazi Treasure
programme.desc: Josh hunts for the hidden treasure of Erwin Rommel, a Nazi general who plundered the wealth of North Africa as his tank corps fled the continent. The search brings Josh to never-explored underground lakes and undersea relics of World War II.

programme.desc: Josh Gates explores the case of lost World War II hero Gertrude 'Tommy' Tompkins of the Women Air Force Service Pilots, who went missing when her P-51 Mustang crashed. Josh joins search teams using cutting-edge technology to bring the lost hero home.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery of the Mummy Desert
programme.desc: New evidence could reveal the remains of an ancient Roman city thought to be lost forever. Strange images from a remote and empty desert could explain the mysterious mummies found there. An apocalyptic sandstorm swallows the Middle East.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Raiders of the Holy Lance
programme.desc: A heavily armored force takes over one of Syria's most ancient archaeology sites, prompting fears that its relics are being stolen. Tanks appear to be facing off in Antarctica next to an unworldly object. A water reservoir in LA suddenly turns black.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Inside El Chapo's Escape
programme.desc: Satellite images reveal how El Chapo escaped from a high security prison in Mexico. Mysterious patterns in the Australian outback and the Kalahari Desert spark a major scientific investigation. A giant black stain appears in a war-torn area of Iraq.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Stonehenge of the Holy Land
programme.desc: Legends of ancient giants surround a mysterious monument in the Holy Land. A bright pink lake could point to a strange, undiscovered new species. When a young boy disappears in a sand dune, satellite images help with the investigation.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Dagger of Tutankhamun
programme.desc: A dagger sealed in the tomb of King Tut for more than 3,000 years is made of a metal that seems to have extraterrestrial origins. A massive swastika is found in the desert near Roswell. Satellites hunt for the world's most wanted man, Joseph Kony.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Did We Find Flight 370?
programme.desc: Investigators find a new clue about the missing Malaysia Airlines flight that disappeared in 2014. An astronaut spots something strange in the Sahara Desert. A mysterious orange sludge invades a remote village in Alaska.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Riddle in the Ruins
programme.desc: Strange black holes appear near Egypt's ancient pyramids, and new evidence points to a disturbing conclusion. Ruins in Peru suggests that the Inca people knew far more than previously thought. A mysterious red swarm invades a beach in India.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Gateway to Eden
programme.desc: A buried monument offers new evidence about one of the Bible's greatest mysteries. A giant ominous shadow engulfs the Pacific Ocean. Scientists have trouble explaining a strange lake that's shaped like a perfect circle, and is home to otherworldly life.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost of Zorro
programme.desc: A giant letter Z is carved into a Mexican hillside, evoking the mark of a legendary outlaw. A strange sighting in Germany points to secrets from the Cold War. Massive, blood-red marks in China prompt fears of a violent government crackdown.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Swastika Conspiracy
programme.desc: A sinister giant swastika appears in a forest in Germany. A strange pattern is etched into the desert near the famous Nazca lines, but archaeologists don't know who put it there. Mysterious markings are spotted in an isolated corner of Antarctica.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of the Sea Monster
programme.desc: A strange mass breaches the surface of an ocean near Antarctica, sparking rumors of a mythological sea monster. An area of the US-Mexico border becomes an international mystery. Ancient rock carvings in a mountain range depict weird, unearthly beings.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Storm Shelter Showdown: Part 1
programme.desc: The Raneys help a Missouri homestead with a hungry bear, disease-carrying ticks, no food, and no power.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Storm Shelter Showdown: Part 2
programme.desc: The Raneys help a Missouri homestead with a hungry bear, disease-carrying ticks, no food, and no power.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Charity, Charly and Teretha

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Nikki's Story
programme.desc: Lifelong secret eater Nikki finds her life and career as a costume designer threatened by immobility as her weight climbs to 650 pounds. In urgent need of drastic weight loss, she undergoes gastric bypass and confronts the emotional causes for her eating.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Dottie's Story
programme.desc: Dottie loves being a mom, but at over 600 pounds, she's on the verge of leaving her two young children motherless. She agrees to a drastic new diet, but a life-threatening emergency and her own self-sabotage threaten to derail all hopes for weight loss.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Cynthia's Story
programme.desc: Cynthia is a 610-lb single mother raising five kids. She's been focused on her children, but now realizes what her death would mean for them. As she battles her emotions and the pressures of life, she is forced to fight even harder to save her own life.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Dottie and Cynthia
programme.desc: Dottie faces an unexpected challenge to her weight-loss when her husband's drinking problem becomes intolerable for her and her son. Cynthia starts to wonder if being there for her kids at her current weight is more important than losing more.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Coronavirus Changes Everything
programme.desc: As the threat of coronavirus rises, the Busbys must deal with homeschooling their six daughters and juggling birthday plans amidst the crisis. Hazel's appointment is coming up, but the Busbys aren't sure if it will happen and what the outcome will be.

programme.title: Extraordinary People: Together Forever
programme.desc: Carmen and Lupita are conjoined twins with distinct personalities sharing not only their body, but every moment of their young adult lives and the challenges they face as they fight for their independence, and prepare to for college life away from home.

programme.title: Extraordinary People: World's Smallest Woman: Meet Jyoti

programme.title: Extraordinary People: My Pregnant Husband

programme.title: Obese and Expecting

programme.desc: The Slaton's are larger-than-life sisters who have always relied on each other and food for support. Amy, age 31, is desperate to have children, but hasn't been able to due to her weight. While Tammy, age 32, is one step away from being bedridden.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: 1,000 Pounds to Freedom
programme.desc: Amy and Tammy go to Atlanta to meet Dr. Procter to discuss weight loss surgery. When they arrive, Dr. Procter gives Tammy a hefty weight loss goal before he will approve her for surgery, meanwhile the Dietician has more bad news for Amy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Takes the Cake
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr try to warm up to strangers at a ski lodge and pull up a chair as uninvited guests at an Italian restaurant. And tonight’s punishment takes the cake when the loser is the surprise entertainer at the wrong party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Anniversary Edition
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q, and Murr celebrate three years of embarrassing each other on this special anniversary edition. The guys reveal some never-before-seen bonus footage of their favorite moments from the vault.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Universal Appeal
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe invade Orlando. The guys are out of line managing a ride at a theme park, get all wet on a river adventure, and man the (mis)information booth. Plus, tonight's loser goes from spider hero to barnyard zero.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q say aloha from Hawaii. Tonight, see why it's blood in the water for tonight's big loser, who swims with the fishes after too many fails.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Staten Island Holiday Spectacular
programme.desc: The guys celebrate with some unseasonable specials, followed by new toys you may not want under the tree. Then, gift wrapping goes awry, and the big loser has a close encounter with some hungry wild life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hollywood
programme.desc: The guys fly to LA to try directing before meeting up with Jay and Silent Bob to 'pants' the town red. Later, they throw a huge Hollywood party. Tonight's loser learns the hard way that he's in the band.

programme.title: At Home With Amy Sedaris: New Year's
programme.desc: Amy rings in the New Year and shows how to prepare for the big countdown with a Champaign tower, balloons, songs and more.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: The guys kill time in a waiting room by sharing some TMI texts with strangers, then try to sabotage each other as the wingmen from hell at a dating event. Tonight's big loser gets a very special donation from one of the other Jokers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr explain why they've been doused with water at the mall, and tonight's big loser plays a pirate but won't find any rum in his cup.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: House Hunters International: New Life in County Mayo
programme.desc: An empty nester that fell in love with Ireland early in life decides to return there for good. She has a plan to start a bed and breakfast, but she quickly realizes that doing so in the remote Irish countryside is more challenging than she thought.

programme.title: Build Me Up: Empty Nest, No Stress
programme.desc: A mother in Huntington Beach, CA is preparing for her only son to move away to college, leaving her with an empty nest.

programme.title: Build Me Up: Single and Ready to Shingle
programme.desc: A single woman in Los Angeles decides that enough is enough and reaches out for help fixing and updating her historic home.

programme.title: House Hunters: A Texas Sized Dispute
programme.desc: A couple wants a home closer to their jobs in downtown Dallas. But she's ready to spend big on a move-in ready home with luxury features, while he wants to save big and build some equity with a fixer-upper.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Honeymooners in Perth
programme.desc: A newlywed couple with opposite schedules looks for a change and takes a job opportunity in Perth, Australia. They're looking for three bedrooms, a modern kitchen and space for guests, but finding their ideal location may be a challenge.

programme.title: House Hunters: Every Dog Has Its Day in Denver
programme.desc: Newlyweds agree they need to buy their first home in Denver, Colorado before they can adopt dogs again, but she insists on move-in ready, while he wants as many projects as possible.

programme.title: House Hunters International: New Life in County Mayo
programme.desc: An empty nester that fell in love with Ireland early in life decides to return there for good. She has a plan to start a bed and breakfast, but she quickly realizes that doing so in the remote Irish countryside is more challenging than she thought.

programme.title: Property Brothers Family Flashback: Kate and Gavin
programme.desc: Kate and Gavin moved into their classic Vegas house as newlyweds. Now, the house's vintage character is part of the charm but the old school layout doesn't work for their modern family.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Ready to Spend It All on a Perfect Home
programme.desc: The busy parents of two energetic boys, Michelle and Tom are paying a fortune for a temporary rental and need to find their forever home fast.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Relocation Woes Into Dream Home Joy
programme.desc: Along with their two teenage daughters, Kevin and Suzanne are in the midst of some major life changes. An unexpected relocation means they've had to say goodbye to their beloved home and community.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Historic Home Overhaul
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny Marrs transform the a family's historic, 1893 house. From turning an attic space into two bedrooms to completely renovating the kitchen and living area, they pull out all the stops to give the family of five their first home.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: A Bigger Kitchen for a Growing Family
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny Marrs overhaul an expecting couple's outdated, 1970s home into a space that feels welcoming for their growing family.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Dreary Home Gets Bright Update
programme.desc: A baking aficionado and her husband want to convert their dark, oddly constructed home into a bright and welcoming space for them and their kids.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Century-old Farmhouse Becomes New Forever Home
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny help a couple update their century-old farmhouse so that it better accommodates large family gatherings. Their main goal is to improve flow and add modern amenities without stripping the home of its unique country character.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Outdated to Modern
programme.desc: A family that owns a local brewery purchased an older home rich with history, but the outdated rooms and obsolete features create many challenges. Dave and Jenny add creative and personal touches like a custom, handmade beer tap.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: From Craftsman to Creole Cottage
programme.desc: A couple who loves New Orleans-style architecture asks Dave and Jenny transform their classic Craftsman into a Creole cottage. The duo work to remodel each room with unique touches like antique doors, gas lanterns and an airy front porch.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: From Nightmare Cabin to Family Dream Home
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny modernize a couple's rundown log cabin while keeping its historic integrity intact. The top-to-bottom transformation includes new amenities like a custom live-edge bar, outdoor shower and a brand-new porch.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Entertaining Oasis
programme.desc: A married couple owns a wine bar and loves to entertain, but their home's not quite ready for guests due to its compartmentalized layout, unstable balconies and an enormous, rotting tree.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina spot a listing for a small home near the beach in Costa Mesa, California. The home is in rough shape and will require a lot of work to renovate, but it's in a desirable and eclectic neighborhood.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Backyard Staycation
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a home in Riverside, California, with a massive backyard. It has great views and room to create a pool and outdoor living area fit for a five-star resort.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Hot Market, Fast Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a smoking deal on a house in an up-and-coming neighborhood of Garden Grove, California. With not too much work to be done, this house should be quick flip for them.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Diving Into a Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina buy a large home in Anaheim, California, with some strange additions that could end up costing them thousands of dollars and sacrificing square footage.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Post-Purchase Problems
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are contacted about a three-bedroom, two-bathroom home in Anaheim, California. The home appears to be in great shape and already has some major renovations completed, but the owner doesn't know how much they want to sell it for.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Infringing Flip
programme.desc: A seller is looking to offload a three-bedroom, two-bathroom home in Garden Grove, CA, and asks Tarek and Christina to come have a look. The home already has an open floor plan and a master bedroom, but one of its bedrooms may be illegally permitted.

programme.title: Ancient Top 10: Secrets of Egypt
programme.desc: The secrets of Egypt have captivated humanity for millennia. Aspects of the civilization, including the riddles of the Sphinx, mummification and the pyramids have been some of the greatest archaeological finds in history.

programme.title: Ancient Top 10: Total Dictators
programme.desc: Greed, genocide, political manipulation and murder most foul, these dictators would stop at nothing to make sure their names went down in history as the greatest rulers to have ever lived.

programme.title: Ancient Top 10: Ancient Mysteries
programme.desc: To this day, there are still mysteries surrounding the ancients that have us questioning what we know about these incredible civilizations.

programme.title: Ancient Top 10: Ancient Metropolises

programme.title: Ancient Top 10: Ancient Sieges
programme.desc: The great empires of the ancient world were created through war, and some of the most defining battles were fought through siege warfare. These are moments in history that will never be forgotten. Countdown the top 10 most devastating sieges.

programme.title: Ancient Top 10: Ancient Ships
programme.desc: The ancient world is home to some of the most sophisticated and advanced ships the world has ever seen. See which of the top 10 ancient ships was the most advanced.

programme.title: Ancient Top 10: Greatest Ancient Monuments
programme.desc: Ancient monuments across the globe are emblematic of power. Monuments such as Stonehenge, the Colossus of Rhodes, the great Colosseum and temple of Kamak are all in the running for the most astonishing ancient monument.

programme.title: Ancient Top 10: Most Lethal Weapons
programme.desc: Throughout human history, mankind has strived to create new and inventive ways of killing. Countries conquered and empires shattered on the backs of the most lethal weapons of the ancient world. See the top 10 game-changing deadly weapons.

programme.title: Ancient Top 10: Ancient Greek Tech
programme.desc: Pioneering technological inventors, the ancient Greeks created inventions that were seemingly impossible: an ancient death ray constructed by Archimedes, Heron's automatic doors, Philon's ingenious use of robotics.

programme.title: Movie: Guys and Dolls

programme.title: Movie: The Lady Eve
programme.desc: A woman disguises herself as a socialite to make a man fall in love with her again.

programme.title: Movie: Arsenic and Old Lace

programme.title: Movie: Some Like It Hot

programme.title: Movie: The Leopard Man

programme.title: Movie: Easy Living

programme.title: Movie: Wichita

programme.title: Movie: Great Day in the Morning
programme.desc: A Confederate sympathizer and a spy are both after the same gold and local ladies.

programme.title: Movie: Mission of Danger

programme.title: Coop & Cami Ask the World: Would You Wrather Crash a Wedding?
programme.desc: In a desperate attempt to avoid going to Charlotte's bassoon performance, Coop, Cami and Fred come up with an elaborate scheme that involves them crashing a wedding.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Desserted/ The Gifted

programme.title: Big City Greens: Time Crisis/ Gramma Driver
programme.desc: Remy's plan for his whole life is thrown into question when he is unprepared for a violin recital. Later, Gramma becomes a rideshare driver, only to find her best customers are thieves.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Garage Tales/ Animal Farm

programme.title: The Owl House: Once Upon a Swap
programme.desc: A simple disagreement leads to a complex situation when Eda, King, and Luz triple-down on a wager.

programme.title: Jessie: Used Karma
programme.desc: After Jessie accepts an invitation for lunch with Tony, the building's doorman, Emma offers Jessie unsolicited dating advice she has learned from her stash of teen magazines. Meanwhile, Ravi becomes the target of Luke's practical jokes.

programme.title: Jessie: The Talented Mr. Kipling

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Underwater Mega Tower
programme.desc: One of the most cutting-edge buildings in the world is a 16-story hotel built on the cliffs of an abandoned quarry, and using the latest science and tech, engineers race to build this innovative mega-structure with two underwater floors.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Skyscrapers of the Deep
programme.desc: To build the world's biggest offshore wind farm, engineers and builders braved the deadly waters of the North Sea, and using the latest science and tech, these innovators constructed 175 towering turbines that can withstand the most hellish conditions.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: US Army's Super Tank
programme.desc: The US Army's Abrams tank is a 70-ton war machine capable of reaching speeds of 45 miles per hour on the most extreme terrains on earth, but before it enters the battlefield, it must face a set of brutal challenges to put its engineering to the test.

programme.title: Super Factories: Inside the Tesla Gigafactory
programme.desc: Special access to Tesla's record-breaking Gigafactory reveals its bold ambition to build one of the most advanced cars in the world; this cutting-edge facility is one of the world's largest, representing the frontier of engineering innovation.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Texas Super Skyscraper
programme.desc: A brand-new skyscraper in Texas is a gravity-defying engineering marvel with a one-of-a-kind shape, and to built it, experts use cutting-edge construction and design that pushes modern-day tower-building to strange and innovative heights.

programme.title: Super Factories: NASA's Rocket Factory
programme.desc: NASA's hi-tech rocket assembly facility pushes the limits of space exploration to new frontiers; here, engineers build an advanced rocket propulsion system that can send astronauts and cargo to the moon and back.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Escobar's Castle
programme.desc: The ruins of a once-palatial compound contain the secrets of one of history's most notorious criminals. Plus, new discoveries reveal why this high-security estate was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Texas Super Skyscraper
programme.desc: A brand-new skyscraper in Texas is a gravity-defying engineering marvel with a one-of-a-kind shape, and to built it, experts use cutting-edge construction and design that pushes modern-day tower-building to strange and innovative heights.

programme.title: Super Factories: NASA's Rocket Factory
programme.desc: NASA's hi-tech rocket assembly facility pushes the limits of space exploration to new frontiers; here, engineers build an advanced rocket propulsion system that can send astronauts and cargo to the moon and back.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Escobar's Castle
programme.desc: The ruins of a once-palatial compound contain the secrets of one of history's most notorious criminals. Plus, new discoveries reveal why this high-security estate was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Super Factories: Inside the Tesla Gigafactory
programme.desc: Special access to Tesla's record-breaking Gigafactory reveals its bold ambition to build one of the most advanced cars in the world; this cutting-edge facility is one of the world's largest, representing the frontier of engineering innovation.

programme.title: Bermuda Triangle: The New Secrets
programme.desc: Using cutting-edge technology, experts investigate the truth behind the Bermuda triangle.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Underwater Ghost Prison
programme.desc: An entrance to the underworld in the American wild, a haunting Soviet underwater prison, and a strange complex of towers in a forest of ice are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Desert Ghost Fort
programme.desc: A secret Russian military base in the Gobi Desert, a strange complex in an American wasteland, and a relic high atop a mountain are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Labyrinth of the Dead
programme.desc: Tunnels filled with human bones lie beneath the streets of Paris, and this horrifying engineering marvel points to a dark secret. New discoveries reveal why this grisly underground death maze was built, and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Conspiracy in the Buried City
programme.desc: Residents devised an ingenious trick to keep the location of buried ancient city hidden five stories underground secret from invaders; experts reveal what it was, and using the latest tech, they reveal the truth behind this strange place.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Ghosts of the Hell Maze
programme.desc: A labyrinth of vast tunnels in the French countryside has served as a secret hideout during wartime for centuries, and on its walls, experts have discovered the final confessions of soldiers who fought here during one of the deadliest days of World War I.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Mystery of the Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: A strange, centuries-old labyrinth built into an abandoned quarry was built by an eccentric millionaire, and no one knows why; but now, a new excavation into this mysterious 9,000-foot tunnel system might finally reveal its dark secrets.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Terror Tunnels
programme.desc: A vast system of tunnels built almost three thousand years ago was the site of the greatest battles of antiquity, and these disorienting passages could be the deadliest weapon in war. Experts reveal what made this underground world so terrifying.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Cave of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: An eerie system of underground vaults in Scotland was once the hideout for thieves who stole newly-buried bodies and sold them; today, experts are excavating these rubble-filled caves to reveal the secrets of what these bandits left behind.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: The Renegade's Lair
programme.desc: A strange underground system known as the Black Cave is connected to a fairytale castle and was home to an infamous nobleman on the run from the law; today, experts investigate the secrets he left here to discover new parts of this mysterious network.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Treasures of the Lost Mine
programme.desc: Caverns hidden deep inside a remote mountain are home to a precious mineral found nowhere else on earth, and experts and treasure hunters use cutting-edge technology to follow rumours of a mysterious long-lost mine in search of a payday.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Curse of Cannibal Caves
programme.desc: A mysterious cave system is home to some of the oldest human remains ever discovered, and today, the explorers and researchers investigating this site are uncovering shocking evidence of cannibalism among its Ice Age denizens.

programme.title: See No Evil: Vanished at Noon
programme.desc: On November 26th, 2014, Jessica Padgett disappears. The only lead is her abandoned white Subaru. Surveillance cameras show her driving into a parking lot and walking down a back alley, never to return.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Vanishing Babysitter
programme.desc: 15-year-old Elizabeth Ennen was last seen when a friend dropped her off at home. Her distraught mother Virginia says she never walked through the door. Police are baffled until they uncover a piece of CCTV that turns the case in an unexpected direction.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Last Shop
programme.desc: On March 29, 2016, music loving Louise Dickey is discovered brutally murdered in a bath of her own blood. With no imaginable motive for the homicide and no witnesses, detectives seek out surveillance cameras to uncover the shocking truth.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Who Killed Fabio?
programme.desc: Fabio Sementilli was a beloved hairstylist and beauty executive who was murdered while relaxing near his pool. Michelle Miller investigates his murder and the hunt for his killers.

programme.title: See No Evil: Lock Up
programme.desc: When Marcel Reardon is discovered bludgeoned to death outside an apartment building, his friends deny all knowledge of his murder. But detectives are convinced at least one of them is lying. As the net closes, the prime suspect prepares to strike again.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Case Against Ezra McCandless
programme.desc: A young woman claims she was attacked by an ex-boyfriend who carved the word boy into her arm. But the crime scene tells a different story.

programme.title: See No Evil: I'd Kill to Be You
programme.desc: On November 12, 2012, Atlanta entrepreneur Terry Porter is found shot dead, execution style in the front yard of his home. There is no forensic evidence and no witnesses to the murder.

programme.title: See No Evil: Lock Up
programme.desc: When Marcel Reardon is discovered bludgeoned to death outside an apartment building, his friends deny all knowledge of his murder. But detectives are convinced at least one of them is lying. As the net closes, the prime suspect prepares to strike again.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Case Against Ezra McCandless
programme.desc: A young woman claims she was attacked by an ex-boyfriend who carved the word boy into her arm. But the crime scene tells a different story.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Vanishing Babysitter
programme.desc: 15-year-old Elizabeth Ennen was last seen when a friend dropped her off at home. Her distraught mother Virginia says she never walked through the door. Police are baffled until they uncover a piece of CCTV that turns the case in an unexpected direction.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: When Crystal McDowell vanished outside Houston during Hurricane Harvey, 48 HRS gained unprecedented access inside the police command center as the heavy rains and high floodwaters hindered the search and washed away vital evidence. Maureen Maher reports.

programme.title: Swamp Murders: Point of No Return
programme.desc: When shots ring out on a remote Florida beach, officers are devastated to learn the lives of two Georgia teens have been lost. Even with two jurisdictions on the case, leads are scarce. Until an unexpected call comes in and promises swift resolution.

programme.title: Swamp Murders: Secret Rendezvous
programme.desc: When a night out ends in bloodshed for 23-year-old Navy veteran Raul Mendoza, Houston police have a lot of questions on their hands. But a tip from Raul's sister soon reveals that someone police have met before may hold the answers.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Coal Miner's Slaughter
programme.desc: A respected businesswoman in the placid town of Madisonville, KY is found bludgeoned and stabbed to death in her home.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Horror in the Heartland
programme.desc: Neighbors are sometimes miles apart in the tiny town of Horton, Kansas, but news travels fast when Patricia Kimmi disappears from her home. Evidence leads investigators to believe she may not be found alive. And worse, that her killer still lurks.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Say it Ain't So
programme.desc: The Long Branch Saloon is the local hangout for most everyone in the small town of Poteau, Oklahoma. That is until its beloved proprietor goes missing, leaving behind a splatter of blood and many unanswered questions.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: When longtime resident Sharron Erickson is found raped and murdered in the tiny Midwestern town of Colon, Nebraska, the community is stunned that the recent retiree could be the victim of such a savage crime.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: No Witnesses
programme.desc: When two young ladies don't return home after a run to the local drive-thru, their concerned parents immediately set out on a search to find them. However it will be a fisherman that will give police their first clue that something evil has happened.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Who's Missing Now
programme.desc: When beloved young waitress Zilpha Lowery goes missing, foul play is immediately suspected. Rumors of her fate drift through town and tie her to another mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Secrets of a Country Store
programme.desc: As the last dry county in the state of Alabama, Clay County is a place stuck in time. When local bootlegger Billy Triplett and his wife turn up dead in the town of Barfield, locals suspect it must have had something to do with his illegal side-business.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Hunting Season
programme.desc: A 27 year old mother of two disappeared from a small vacation town in Wisconsin in 2008. Family, friends, local reporters and police investigators recall the fear and sadness the shocking crime instilled on their tight-knit community.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Route 29
programme.desc: In August 2013, a 17-year-old rising social media star and high school athlete disappeared along the infamous Route 29. A massive search by local and federal authorities yielded zero results until a security video revealed a chilling clue.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: In Too Deep
programme.desc: Prominent business people John and Liz Calvert, vanish in 2008 from upscale paradise Hilton Head, SC. Friends, sheriff's investigators and local reporters recall the shock and disbelief the couple disappeared without a trace from a place so peaceful.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Unsafe Anywhere
programme.desc: 21 year old Joel Larson is shot to death in a safe haven community for gay people in 1990's Minneapolis. Two more shootings terrorize the community as they realize a serial killer in disguise lives among them.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Gaddafi: Mad Dog of the Middle East
programme.desc: The story of the world's longest serving dictator, Muammar Gaddafi, and his 42 year reign of terror at home in Libya and around the world. His actions are so increasingly insane that President Reagan dubs him The Mad Dog of the Middle East.

programme.title: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, see the reality.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Kung Fu Nun
programme.desc: 1644. Ng Mui escapes from Beijing. Taking refuge in a Shaolin monastery, she learns their Kung Fu and develops a new form of the martial art.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Rome's Navy Seals
programme.desc: They are the amphibious Roman unit tasked with the impossible. Called Batavians, they led the invasion of ancient Britain in AD43. Discover the story behind a desperate mission deep in enemy territory that may hand the emperor an unlikely victory.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Vlad's Impalers
programme.desc: Vlad the Impaler, the inspiration for the fictional character of Dracula, was one of the most ruthless and brutal rulers in medieval Europe.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Menace
programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Head Quarters
programme.desc: Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: Gunslingers: The Tombstone Vendetta
programme.desc: When one of the frontier's bravest men discovers the limits of the law in the most dangerous boomtown in the West, he exacts his own brand of justice on the cowboys who shot his brothers.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Butch Cassidy: The Perfect Criminal
programme.desc: Until the day he died, whenever that was, nobody ever outsmarted Butch Cassidy. He always got away. Cassidy was an outlaw who lived more by his wits than by his gun.

programme.desc: An inquiry into whether Iran was really behind the Lockerbie Bombing, if the CIA invented and promoted suicide bombing in the Middle East, why there were no photos of Bin Laden's body and if 9/11 was actually an inside job.

programme.desc: Mark and the guys save a log cabin from an old Virginia tobacco farm and to turn it into a tasting room for a local distillery.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: From Soaked to Saved
programme.desc: A couple has invested in a 50-year-old abandoned home in Dewey Beach, Delaware. They decide to hand the reins over to Marnie in the hopes she'll turn the fixer-upper into a safe vacation destination for their two boys.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Save It or Sell It
programme.desc: A couple loves Lewes and the cheerful home they own there, but their two daughters have outgrown the space. Now, the family's torn between selling the house or renovating it. Marnie tries to expand the home without losing its historic charm.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Beauty and the Beach
programme.desc: A townhouse overlooking Bethany Beach is dated and awkward. Marnie attempts to update the home, but the discovery of water damage may affect her ability to make the most of its dazzling view.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Open-Concept Canal Home
programme.desc: Karen's 30-year-old canal-side home has an enormous backyard and attractive deck area, but its choppy 1980s layout and awkward additions aren't functional for entertaining. Marnie has big plans for it including an indoor and outdoor kitchen renovation.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Amazing A-Frame
programme.desc: A couple turns to Marnie to help them transform their shabby A-frame retreat into a beautiful family beach home.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Big Family, Bigger Beach Home
programme.desc: A couple's Dewey Beach home has become cramped and in need of reconfiguration. With a new open-concept layout, Marnie aims to preserve the integrity of the house while improving the flow and maximizing space.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Rare and Recycled
programme.desc: A determined couple has found a 1960s gem of a beach home with a rare design element: a unique breezeway running through its center. The couple is serious about preserving its classic look and expanding upon the unique breezeway.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Desert Oasis in Sin City
programme.desc: Mike Baldasare and Jim Bellamy, two best friends that build award winning pools for clients all across the southwest, head to Las Vegas to build a dream pool for Shane and Willow Jager's brand new dream home.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Georgia Peach Pool Paradise
programme.desc: The Parrish family has saved their whole lives to build a tropical pool paradise in the heart of Georgia. But not everything is peachy on this build when hard soil and a complicated lazy river design present major challenges for the team.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Twice as Nice
programme.desc: A Kentucky couple seeks out the kings to help them revamp their worn-out lakeside swimming pool. The guys accept the challenge and turn the eyesore into a backyard paradise complete with a custom slide, secondary pool and more.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Living La Vida Lakeside
programme.desc: After 14 years of dreaming, a Lake Jackson, Texas, family is finally building their custom home on a piece of land around Pecan Lake. Located on a peninsula, the backyard leaves the ideal space to build a one-of-a-kind vanishing edge pool.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Slidin' Into Home
programme.desc: A Texas family returns to their home state of North Carolina and wants to add a pool to their 70-acre property. The kinds design a pool packed with fun features including a custom slide, a waterfall and an outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Southern Oasis Pool
programme.desc: A family wants to turn their flat Houston, Texas, yard into a southern oasis. Unpredictable weather, tricky soil conditions and some new material leaves Paul and Brian figuring out how to blow the family's expectations out of the water.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Lap of Luxury
programme.desc: A Tennessee native is building her dream home in Brentwood, but the steep elevation of her new lot poses a challenge for the build. Kyle and Justin create a lavish pool, accented by six fire features, a beautiful vanishing edge and two tanning ledges.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Game Time
programme.desc: After dealing with hot summers and limited options for swimming, a Tennessee father has decided it's time to get a pool of his own. The Pool Kings are up for the task and create a sports pool that will provide endless entertainment.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Magnificent Mediterranean Pool
programme.desc: This pool is so extraordinary it takes over a year to build. From a 60-foot pool and a 14-foot spa to a hand-carved Italian marble fountain, the kinds pull out all the stops to give a family a piece of the Mediterranean.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Bling by the Bay
programme.desc: A Florida family recruits the kings to design a sleek, modern pool for their oceanfront home on Tampa Bay. The crew creates an over-the-top pool with a vanishing edge spa and a roman soaking tub that's adorned with LED lighting and fire bowls.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Spa Fabulous
programme.desc: After recovering from a harrowing parachuting incident, a military veteran learned to walk again, got married, started a family and is now ready to build a pool. The custom oasis includes a jumping rock, a Baja shelf and plunge spa.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Cliffside Dreams
programme.desc: A couple with a crew of rambunctious kids and a dream house in San Antonio is in desperate need of a pool. The kings design an expansive pool with a Baja shelf, swim-up bar, giant infinity edge and massive two-storey deck to enjoy the view.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Decadent Regional Dishes
programme.desc: Baton Rouge, La. native and Food Network Star finalist, Jay Ducote, joins Michael Symon for a French and Cajun-inspired burger with a twist.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bacon Behemoths
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to Providence, where a traditional Rhode Island hot wiener in a crepe topped with chili is the ultimate local comfort food. In Indianapolis, he digs into a steak patty topped with Chinese char siu slaw.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Burnt Ends For Breakfast
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to Plainview, N.Y., where a chocolate bacon burger is loaded from top to bottom with sweet and savory indulgence. A restaurant in Columbus, Ohio, has a soy-marinated pineapple hanger steak draped over spicy kimchi fried rice.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: O.G. Flavor
programme.desc: Michael Symon visits his hometown of Cleveland, where a lamb burger with kalamata olive salt gives him a nostalgic taste of his Greek heritage.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fireside Hangs
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is hanging out with two chefs putting a whole new spin on rotisserie cooking in the great outdoors. At SpringHouse restaurant in Alexander City, Ala., Chef Rob McDaniel has designed a fire-fueled contraption that he and Roger use to roast.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Florida Fixins
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in Florida fanning the flames for something savory and something sweet. Roger heads to Hamaknockers Bar-B-Que in Crawfordville, where a young pitmaster pulls pork with a power tool!

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Southern Sizzle and Smoke
programme.desc: At a non-profit organization to support veterans in Georgia, Roger Mooking helps cook a whole mutton and slow-roast veggies for a cookout. At Bob Sykes Bar-B-Q in Bessemer, AL, he loads 250 pounds of salted pork into a 15-foot pit.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Too Hot to Handle
programme.desc: Roger meets two talented chefs who own two spectacular outdoor cooking rigs.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Secret Menus
programme.desc: You have to be in the know to order secret menu must-haves like super-stacked sandwiches and burgers, mac and cheese biscuits, chicken and doughnut mashups and even a pizza piled high with 30 tacos.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Tasty Twists
programme.desc: From a lobster and filet mignon taco donut to a classic Japanese noodle dish done as juicy burger, these chefs are serving up some of the country's most mouth-watering mashups.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Brew and Chew
programme.desc: The best bar food at the some of the best small breweries across the country is highlighted. From ale-glazed wings to beer-braised pork shoulder, beer has gone from a frosty sidekick to a key ingredient, and diners are ready to drink it all in.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Crepes, Curry and Hot Dogs
programme.desc: Brad Miller travels to Los Angeles to visit a husband-and-wife-owned truck whose authentic, buttery French crepes are winning over Californians. Next, he's off to North Carolina for a taste of Indian street food.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Stuffed Arepas, Mac 'n' Cheese and Doughnuts
programme.desc: Brad Miller gets a taste of Venezuelan street food at Arepas House food truck in Denver, Colo., where Chef Jorge Dominguez serves a traditional corncake sandwich filled with marinated flank steak, grilled pork sausage and creamy avocado sauce.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Super-Sized
programme.desc: Roger Mooking sets out on a culinary odyssey around the country to find the 12 best super-sized dishes. He's hanging out with chefs to learn all their secrets for creating ultimate omelets, steaks, sandwiches, seafood platters and more.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Grilled
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 12 of the best grilled dishes in restaurants across America. He's hanging out in the kitchens of fire-loving chefs to learn everything there is to know about applying heat and smoke for the tastiest chicken, beef, and more.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Three-Alarm Fire
programme.desc: Roger visits Faith's Farm in Bonfield, IL for an awesome feast cooked on three different fiery contraptions.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Grillin' and Smokin'
programme.desc: Roger is grilling steaks and chickens in California, and smoking a bounty of seafood in Illinois. High heat for meat and low smoke for seafood.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Puerto Rican Grilling
programme.desc: Roger is in Puerto Rico where the weather is hot, the view is smoking and the food is a fuego. It's his first time visiting Puerto Rico and he's inviting his friends along for the ride.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Southwest Smoke Signals
programme.desc: The smoke signals of fiery feasts lure Roger Mooking to the Southwest, where his first stop is West Alley BBQ and Smokehouse in Chandler, Ariz. The hot spot specializes in Tennessee-style barbecue.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat Masters
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets two barbecue brainiacs who have mastered the art of marrying heat and meat to turn out top-notch barbecue. Pitmaster Christopher Prieto teaches students the science of smoking and seasoning meats at Prime Barbecue.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Getting Piggy With It
programme.desc: Roger Mooking goes hog-wild at two legendary barbecue restaurants located in America's Barbecue Belt. At A&R Bar-B-Que in Memphis, Roger helps owner Andrew Pillard load racks of St. Louis-style ribs into custom wood-fired pits.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Eggs Men
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets the royal treatment with "ye olde eats" at the Hoggetown Medieval Faire in Gainesville, Fla. Meat is all over the menu, and Noah goes wild for the smoked bison burger and the wild boar leg.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dates on a Plane
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in the California desert for a date with deliciousness at the Riverside County Fair and National Date Festival. He tries spicy treats like the fire fingers kartwheel and the sonoran fire dog.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mad Snacks: Berry Road
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels back in time at the Texas Renaissance Festival, where the medieval-inspired meals range from the Sir Francis fry dog to the crown jewel. Then it's over to Plant City, Fla., where Noah chows down on some berry delicious carnival treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Requiem For An Ice Cream
programme.desc: Noah Cappe rolls into Alabama for some country carnival cookin' at the Greater Gulf State Fair in Mobile. He digs into the dirty bird turkey leg and takes a ride on a crazy midway mashup.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fairground Showdown
programme.desc: In this all-star episode of Carnival Eats, host Noah Cappe visits California, home to some of the biggest and best fair in America.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Gourmets of the Galaxy
programme.desc: The Iowa State Fair welcomes Noah Cappe with a trio of meaty masterpieces, but it's the double Dutch almond funnel that has everyone jumping with joy.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: A Day of Comfort Food
programme.desc: Comfort food enthusiast Eddie Jackson runs down a day full of the best comfort food in the world, starting with an indulgent brioche French toast breakfast and an over-the-top sweet and savory brunch. He then grabs hot dogs and hamburgers for lunch.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Hot 'n' Spicy
programme.desc: The temperature is rising, and some folks like it really hot! Eddie Jackson shares hot and spicy dishes that give a little sweet, a little savory and a whole lot of spice.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: DuckTales: Nothing Can Stop Della Duck!
programme.desc: Della Duck has faced every danger the moon has to offer to reunite with her family, but her greatest challenge is one she might not be able to fight her way out of.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Donald Duck?!
programme.desc: Donald and Penumbra must break out of a Moon Prison and send a warning to Earth about a looming invasion. Meanwhile, Dewey and Webby uncover a sinister conspiracy targeting their family.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Heat Beaters / Bill-iever
programme.desc: Cricket and Remy play a game of 'H-O-R-S-E'; Cricket tries to make his dad believe in aliens to avoid punishment.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Barry Cuda/ Suite Retreat
programme.desc: Cricket uses his first tip from working at Big Coffee to buy a singing toy fish. Gramma kicks the family out of the house for the day.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: The Owl House: A Lying Witch and a Warden
programme.desc: When 14-year-old outcast Luz discovers a portal to a new world, she meets a witch, Eda, and a demon named King. In order to get home, Luz has to help them with a mission.

programme.title: The Owl House: Witches Before Wizards
programme.desc: Luz receives a map for a mystical quest from an ancient wizard.

programme.title: The Owl House: Hooty's Moving Hassle
programme.desc: When Luz, Willow and Gus accidentally animate the Owl House, the house runs amok around Bonesborough.

programme.title: The Owl House: Escape of the Palisman
programme.desc: When an adventure with Eda's staff goes awry, Luz and her friends have to earn the staff back from a mysterious forest creature, or lose the staff forever.

programme.title: The Owl House: Something Ventured, Someone Framed
programme.desc: When Gus sneaks Luz into Hexside School to present at the Human Appreciation Society, Luz sees a side of the school she didn't expect.

programme.title: The Owl House: Lost in Language
programme.desc: Luz's pranks at the library lead to unintended consequences.

programme.title: The Owl House: Once Upon a Swap
programme.desc: A simple disagreement leads to a complex situation when Eda, King, and Luz triple-down on a wager.

programme.title: The Owl House: The Intruder
programme.desc: Luz and King must defend The Owl House from a mysterious intruder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Telltale Tracks

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ghost in the Machine
programme.desc: In May of 1999, a minister's wife died in the bathtub from being unconscious.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage

programme.title: Forensic Files: When the Dust Settled

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sphere of Influence

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nailed

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Disappearance
programme.desc: When a girl disappears from church, investigators fear a stalker is preying on children.

programme.desc: An evening out to a murder mystery theatre turns into a real life whodunit.

programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elephant Tracks
programme.desc: A jeweler notices that a victim wore an elephant pendant that had been pawned in her shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bag of Evidence

programme.title: Mom: Pork Loin and a Beat-up Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Christy competes with her classmates for a prestigious internship, and Bonnie babysits Tammy following her oral surgery.

programme.title: Mom: Flamingos and a Dance-Based Exercise Class
programme.desc: Bonnie and the ladies help Tammy prepare for her first date since getting out of prison. Also, in order to take the edge off, Christy revisits one of her old vices.

programme.title: Mom: Hacky Sack and a Beautiful Experience
programme.desc: Christy’s smoking causes problems when the ladies take a road trip. Also, Bonnie offers Adam unsolicited business advice.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Is Lie-able for Benny's Unhappiness
programme.desc: When the love of Benny's life returns to town, George builds a web of lies to keep them from reuniting.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Rocks to the Max and Gets Diss-Band-ed
programme.desc: In an episode directed by award-winning film actor, Andy Garcia, George tries to relive his high school days by teaching Max to play the guitar, but when Max moves on without his dad and joins a rock band, George wishes he could take it all back.

programme.title: George Lopez: George Gets Smoking Mad at Benny and Develops an Oral Fixation
programme.desc: When Power Aviation institutes a smoking ban, Benny's nicotine withdrawals drive George to self-destructive behaviour.

programme.title: Full House: Love on the Rocks
programme.desc: A mountain-climbing expedition makes D.J. question her relationship with Steve.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Krushers/ The Card
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick become wrestlers as part of Mr. Krab's newest get-rich quick scheme.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save a Runaway Stargazer
programme.desc: A comet is coming, and the PAW Patrol gets to work building a giant observatory! When the observatory starts rolling out-of-control, Rubble and the pups need to rebuild everything it has destroyed in this Ultimate Construction Rescue.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Flying Frog/ Pups Save the Space Alien
programme.desc: Marshall's pet frog Smiley, while practicing for a jumping contest, jumps into Skye's helicopter as it takes off. Later, the PAW Patrol help out aliens that have landed at Farmer Yumi's.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Stinky Flower/ Pups Save a Monkey-Naut
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger drops off a 'gift' to Mayor Goodway, a flower that spreads a horrible stink when it blooms.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Get Growing/ Pups Save a Space Toy
programme.desc: Fertilizer causes Yumi's crops to sprout huge veggies, so Ryder and the Paw Patrol must corral the stampeding produce. The Paw Patrol draws a message on Farmer Al's field to tell the space aliens the pups found their lost toy.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save Their Floating Friends/ Pups Save a Satellite
programme.desc: A satellite is out of orbit and falling towards Adventure Bay so the PAW Patrol must fix it before it crash lands.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Space Rock/ Pups Save a Good Mayor
programme.desc: Everest, the Turbots, and a Space Rock get trapped in a cave. Mayor Gooway goes missing, and Mayor Humdinger causes havoc in Adventure Bay.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: Robots in Space
programme.desc: When Space Commander Megan is marooned on Pluto, our robot heroes will race through wormholes, shoot past ice volcanoes, and blast straight through an asteroid field to bring their new friend back home.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: The Great Space Race
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ take off into space for a race that's out of this world! Along the way to Planet Victory, they meet friendly aliens, dodge asteroids, and face off against Crusher's space ship.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: Space Alien Adventure!
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ make friends with a space alien named Gormy. But when Gormy's jetpack loses power, they set out to help him find six special space batteries so he can fly home to his alien family.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save an Antarctic Martian/Pups Save the Maze Explorers

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Humsquatch / Pups Save a Far Flung Flying Disc

programme.title: Storage Wars: Midnight in the Gardena Good and Evil
programme.desc: Two psychics 'see' inside the units at Gardena and have a 'dark' feeling about the place.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Young With the Gun
programme.desc: In Riverside, Jarrod and Barry are greeted by a mob of eager newbies. With their financial futures at stake, the buyers must choose to fight or befriend the crowd. Barry Weiss buys a 'mystery trunk.'

programme.title: Storage Wars: Gambler's Last Resort
programme.desc: The buyers journey eastward to the city of sin for a marathon of auctions. But with a 300-mile haul between them and their stores, the rules of the game have changed. Now on a level playing field, Jarrod fires back at the big dogs.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Live and Let Bid
programme.desc: In the hippie-town of Encinitas, the buyers comb for '70s memorabilia. When Darrell declares this facility his 'home turf,' the other bidders are forced to fight for their claim of the treasure. Barry finds a relic from his past.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Pay the Lady
programme.desc: When auctioneer Dan Dotson calls in sick, his wife Laura will have to pull out all the stops to sell these lockers.

programme.title: Storage Wars: San Burrito
programme.desc: Back in San Bernardino, Barry brings a good luck charm that yields a tasty reward.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Enemy of the Enemy
programme.desc: Trouble comes to Mission Hills, California when a mysterious new bidder plans to dominate the competition.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Tanks for the Memories
programme.desc: Surf's up when the buyers head to Huntington Beach. Darrell goes fishing for a locker, while Barry sets his sights on some antique Militaria.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Santa Ana Street Fight
programme.desc: In Santa Ana, California, trashy looking units hold a gold mine of goods. From kayaks to golf clubs, the buyers flock to this tough town and break the bank.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Fire in the Hole
programme.desc: In Mission Hills, California the new bidder is back, along with his man-purse full of cash.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Stairway to Hemet
programme.desc: The buyers roll into the wide-open desert in Hemet, California to try their luck.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Driving Miss Barry
programme.desc: The buyers look for finds in the wealthy beach neighbourhood of Westminster, CA.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Dial C for Chupacabra
programme.desc: The buyers head to Westminster, Calif. where Darrell and Brandon meet a legend. Jarrod and Brandi do the right thing, while Dave Hester smells lame lockers and bags one somewhere else.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Fast and the Curious
programme.desc: The buyers negotiate the desert winds of Lancaster, CA.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Buy, Buy Birdie
programme.desc: The buyers roll into the city of Chino, Calif. Darrell gives Brandon a chance in the driver's seat. Jarrod and Brandi discover a 'big boy' unit. Dave Hester buys in bulk and wins big. Barry buys a locker that will soar with the eagles.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Sheets and Geeks
programme.desc: The buyers blow into Santa Ana, Calif., where Barry Weiss climbs aboard the buying express, and one buyer finds something that's got magic written all over it.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Like a Kung Pao Cowboy
programme.desc: The buyers return to the scene of Darrell's art heist in Montebello, Calif., and Darrell spreads a rumour about another great locker. Jarrod and Brandi decide it's time to buy big for their new store. Barry's unit has him seeing sunny skies.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Jurassic Bark
programme.desc: The buyers return to Mission Hills, CA, where Jarrod and Brandi find something really old.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Straight Into Compton: Biddaz With Attitude
programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi find a unique suit, while Dave Hester finds himself in a tight squeeze.

programme.title: Storage Wars: No Bid for the Weary
programme.desc: The buyers coast into Costa Mesa, Calif., where Dave Hester finds something that's worth cheering over, and Darrell Sheets buys his biggest locker in Storage Wars history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q enlist shoppers to help them avoid a rogue security guard, and tonight's big loser faces the wrath of a crowd of rockers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: It's Electric
programme.desc: The guys pitch whimsical TV show idea to focus groups and then go to the park with their 'daughters' who share unpopular opinions. The loser heads to the spa for an electrifying punishment.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: The Crying Game
programme.desc: Eddie heads a peer counseling session that leads the crew to learn more about themselves.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Talkoma: The Crying Game
programme.desc: Kevin Heffernan and Steve Lemme take viewers behind the scenes of Tacoma FD.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bad Carma
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q showcase questionable products to participants, and then rescue strangers who don't need to be rescued. Later, the big loser must hit and run his mouth to get himself out of trouble.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Talkoma: The Crying Game

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q and Joe convince shoppers to repeat odd catch phrases, then go mental as psychoanalysts. Plus, tonight's losers perform at a halftime show.

programme.title: Botched: Surgically Enhanced: Jaw Dropping Booberati
programme.desc: Two big-bosomed buddies pay a visit to the doctors, while a Dubrow patient desperately needs help fixing her elephant trunk-looking breast. Meanwhile, a Nassif patient has issues that run deeper than his asymmetrical chin.

programme.title: Botched: Surgically Enhanced: Reality Star Vixens and Their Afflictions
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif has a ruff case ahead of him when a dog bite victim needs some TLC. Dr. Dubrow has his hands full with an OG reality star's 'Real World' uni-boob situation, while a 'Charm School' dropout turned bootylicious needs help with her derriere.

programme.title: Botched: Surgically Enhanced: Boobs Dance and a Second Chance
programme.desc: While Dr. Nassif steps into the surgical ring to help a boxer's crushed nose, Dr. Dubrow needs his A game to bring a young woman's dead breasts back to life. And Norway's biggest breasts loves to make her boobs dance.

programme.title: Botched: Surgically Enhanced: Flaws, Jaws, and Extra Bra
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow helps give a three-boobed woman the perfect pair and Dr. Nassif works to correct a car accident victim's mangled nose. Meanwhile, a 27-year-old LA socialite with jacked up jowls wants a facelift.

programme.title: Botched: Surgically Enhanced: MIA Mound and a DUI Disaster
