programme.title: House: Son of a Coma Guy
programme.desc: House conducts a mini-experiment on the son of man who's been in a coma for 10 years, and the boy is left unconscious. When symptoms point to a possible genetic condition, House and his team must glean a family history from Kyle's only living relative.

programme.title: House: Whac-a-Mole
programme.desc: House's newest patient is 18-year-old Jack, brought to the hospital after experiencing a heart attack and massive vomiting. Barely an adult himself, Jack has been the parent to his younger brother and sister since their parents died.

programme.title: House: Finding Judas
programme.desc: House and the team take on the case of Alice, a young girl with pancreatitis. Since her divorced parents can't agree on how to proceed with her treatment and won't let House bully them into making a decision, House's only option is to take them to court.

programme.title: House: Merry Little Christmas
programme.desc: Detective Tritter's pursuit of House leads Cuddy and Wilson to force House into detox. House and the team try to diagnose one of Cuddy's patients, a 15-year-old dwarf suffering from a collapsed lung.

programme.title: House: Words and Deeds
programme.desc: House is forced to respond in court to the criminal charges against him regarding illegal possession of narcotics, and the judge sets a date for a preliminary hearing. Enough is enough for Cuddy, who insists that House apologize to Detective Tritter.

programme.title: House: One Day, One Room
programme.desc: After beating the drug charges, House is back at the hospital after a short stint in rehab. Cuddy collects on House's debt for perjuring herself on the stand by making him to carry out a series of less-than-desirable patient exams in clinic hours.

programme.title: House: Needle in a Haystack

programme.title: House: Insensitive
programme.desc: House takes special interest in a patient, Hannah, who has sustained injuries from a car accident but is completely insensitive to pain. Cuddy and Wilson accuse House of pushing Hannah's tests to get information that may benefit his own pain management.

programme.title: House: Half-Wit
programme.desc: A 35-year-old musical savant suffers a painful involuntary muscle contraction in his left hand while playing a piano concert. House becomes attracted to the case when he learns that, after a severe bus accident, the patient suffered severe brain damage.

programme.title: House: Top Secret

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: To Contend and Serve!

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Worldly Ways
programme.desc: The Kitchen's host Sunny Anderson and world traveler Andrew Zimmern join forces to beat Bobby Flay. They handpick Brooklyn's finest Jared Forman and Italian master chef Fabio Viviani to deliver the win.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Always Expect the Unexpected
programme.desc: The stakes are high as Ted Allen and Kelsey Nixon step into the arena.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Both Sides of the Coin
programme.desc: Worst Cooks in America's Anne Burrell and Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli hope that they've got all their Bobby Flay-beating bases covered.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: A Cut Above
programme.desc: Clearly someone has some beef to settle when Chefs John Tesar and Terry Sargent step into the arena in the hopes of taking down Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Chocolate Victory

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Bye Bye Birdie
programme.desc: Michael Symon and Jet Tila work hard to outsmart their good friend Bobby Flay. They bring in one of his protégés, Chef Rebecca Weitzman, and fine dining's finest, Chef Brian Lewis, to muscle Bobby out of his kitchen.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Fresh-Squeezed
programme.desc: Michael Symon and Amanda Frietag are ready to make sure Bobby Flay goes home empty-handed. Chef Carrie Eagle soars into the arena to take on Cincinnati stalwart Jose Salazar for a chance to squeeze out a win against Bobby.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Phantom of the Outback
programme.desc: Coyote races to Australia in search of the Perentie monitor. After a grueling week, the team makes one final attempt to capture the lizard and builds a makeshift birds nest filled with fresh eggs, in hopes of capturing the Phantom of the Outback.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Sharks in the Shadows
programme.desc: Coyote and his team travel to Australia to find the wobbegong shark. As night falls, they search the treacherous tidepools for this sly nocturnal predator and ponder whether these fearsome fish are a threat to humans.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Shadow of the Jaguar
programme.desc: Coyote demonstrates how capturing elusive big cats on film is a near-impossible task, but with technological advancements such as trail cameras, nature enthusiasts can see predators like jaguars up close in their natural habitat.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Dinner With a Devil
programme.desc: Coyote heads to Australia's Devil Ark conservatory and reveals the history behind the critically endangered Tasmanian devil. As he is exposed to their habitat and routine, he discovers the manpower needed to conserve this species.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Realm of the Caiman
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson heads to Brazil to encounter the Yacare Caiman. As he swims alongside them in piranha-infested waterways, he studies their perfect-predator personality as jaguars and capybara lurk from the shoreline.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Deadly Tide Pools
programme.desc: Coyote explores the coastline of Australia in hopes of discovering the most toxic aquatic creatures. As he battles the jagged rocks and crashing waves, he encounters a stonefish lurking beneath the mysterious tide pool water.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: To Catch a Monitor
programme.desc: Coyote and his crew venture through the Outback in search of two iconic monitor species. As he swims through the watery oasis, he strategically stalks the Marten’s water monitor in hopes of having a face-to-face encounter.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Legendary Turtle of Texas
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson heads to the swamplands of Texas in search of a giant alligator snapping turtle known as Raphael. Coyote is determined to prove that this turtle is the largest living creature of his kind.

programme.title: River Monsters: Atomic Assassin

programme.title: River Monsters: Colombian Slasher
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade pushes himself and his gear past breaking point to discover what killed a bride in the Colombian Amazon.

programme.title: River Monsters: Killer Torpedo
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade ventures deep into the heart of Central America in search of a man-sized killer. The creature is said to leap into boats, causing fatal injuries when it knocks fishermen unconscious and smashes their bones.

programme.title: River Monsters: Vampires of the Deep
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade embarks on a punishing mission to the heart of a thundering waterfall in the Pacific Northwest to battle an ancient river monster said to rise from the murky depths to attack swimmers.

programme.title: River Monsters: Face Ripper

programme.title: River Monsters: Flesh Ripper

programme.desc: An inventor created a young man but died before finishing Edward, leaving him with scissors for hands. When a cosmetics saleswoman finds him and brings him home, Edward struggles to adapt despite his best efforts.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Hoarding Potential
programme.desc: Flipping team Tarek and Christina purchase and flip dilapidated properties.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Pigeonhole Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take on a home that's full of surprises in Santa Ana, California. They work to modernize the house as much as possible to appeal to the modern-day buyer, but with every challenge comes many problems.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Infested Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina land on a small three-bedroom, two-bathroom home that needs a lot of work in Santa Ana, California. While deciding how to rehab the home, they clash over style so decide to compete to see who has the better design.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Two Houses for Sale
programme.desc: Tarek gets a lead on a house in Buena Park, CA, and calls Christina to check it out. When they arrive at the house, they find that it's dated inside and out.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Small House, Big Problems
programme.desc: Tarek and contractor Izzy Battres take on a small house in Fullerton, CA. The seemingly easy flip becomes difficult when removing a wall creates a nightmare with the city and an unpermitted laundry room must be moved.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Fish Out of Water
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take on a flip in West Covina, CA, a new area for them. They have to expand into new cities to grow their business, but the distance and uncertainty of what buyers there expect lead to disagreements on the scope and design.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Cliff Makeover

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Risky Business: Million-dollar Cookie Cutter
programme.desc: Tarek tackles a cookie-cutter home in Newport Beach, CA, where everything looks exactly the same.

programme.title: Flipping Across America
programme.desc: It's a battle of the small house flip, as Flip or Flop's Tarek and Christina add major upgrades to virtually every inch of a 900 square foot home, while Boise Boys' Clint and Luke spend all their money on expansions.

programme.title: Flipping Across America: Ranch Renovations
programme.desc: Find out which ranch renovation is best, as Flip or Flop: Nashville's Page and DeRon try to transform an old basement ranch into a modern home. Then Flip or Flop: Atlanta's Ken and Anita figure out how to make their ranch home smell better.

programme.title: House Hunters: New Digs in Nashville
programme.desc: Eric Malo's new job offer has him and his wife Alysha packing up in Chicago and heading back to Nashville where they're orginally from. The Malos want to find a house with more room than they have now

programme.title: House Hunters: Three's Not a Crowd in Colorado Springs
programme.desc: A 'throuple' moving to Colorado is in search of a home with a master bath that can accommodate three sinks. The house hunt becomes difficult with only one week to satisfy three very different personalities.

programme.desc: A 'throuple' moving to Colorado is in search of a home with a master bath that can accommodate three sinks. The house hunt becomes difficult with only one week to satisfy three very different personalities.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Cliff Makeover
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take on a house in Anaheim, CA, designed by architect Cliff May. Having flipped a Cliff May house before, they're prepared to spend big for a mid-century makeover.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Risky Business: Million-dollar Cookie Cutter
programme.desc: Tarek tackles a cookie-cutter home in Newport Beach, CA, where everything looks exactly the same.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Natural Disaster
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead from their friend and investor, Pete, on a house he's recently purchased. It's situated in an upscale, gated neighbourhood and it's a house Pete can't tackle on his own.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Big Money Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are contacted by an out-of-state seller looking to sell an old family home. it's a large house in original condition and could be a great flip.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: House of Hidden Horrors
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina head to La Habra, California to check out an enticing off-market listing. The home is typical for the area and appears to need only cosmetic updating.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: A Frantic Fiasco
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina head to Placentia, California, to check out a lead on a mid-century property. The home is dated but the size and layout is a designer's dream, and most importantly, the numbers indicate it could be a profitable deal.

programme.title: Beach Around the World: Family Fun in Costa Rica
programme.desc: A family ditch the harsh winters of Connecticut for Costa Rica. They are eager to relax and focus on the most important things in life, preferring a place next to the clear waters of the Pacific Ocean.

programme.title: Beach Around the World: Exploring the Gold Coast of Costa Rica
programme.desc: A Phoenix couple who've visited Costa Rica several times feel like they are at home there and seek to leave a hectic lifestyle. They seek a home with the ocean as part of the new house.

programme.title: Beach Around the World: Bright Days in Belize
programme.desc: After the passing of her husband, a woman and her family decide to keep his legacy alive by traveling. The first adventure of the family's new life will be finding an ideal beach house with enough space for six in Belize's Caye Caulker.

programme.title: Beach Around the World: Putting Down Roots in Spain
programme.desc: Rebecca had a career helping companies with growth marketing campaigns in Boston and, later, in Oslo. In between her projects, she travelled all over the world, from Bali to Mexico and fell in love with the lifestyle led on the islands.

programme.title: Beach Around the World: Falling in Love with Mallorca
programme.desc: A man tired of the cold weather in the United Kingdom moved to Mallorca two years ago to change his lifestyle and work as a DJ where he met a woman and fell in love. They dream of a cozy place with an amazing sea view.

programme.title: Beach Around the World: From Mountains to Coast
programme.desc: A Colorado couple move to Portugal to live a slower-paced lifestyle. They would like their home to be walking distance from the beach.

programme.title: Beach Around the World: Natural Beauty in the Azores
programme.desc: A couple who've dreamed about living on an island in the Atlantic visit Azores and quickly realize it's the place for them.

programme.title: Beach Around the World: Family Time in Belize
programme.desc: A family fell in love with Belize while on vacation and decide to leave the US and move to the idyllic Caye Caulker. They are looking for the perfect house near the dazzling waters of the Caribbean.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: A Place You Never Want to Leave
programme.desc: A Florida couple sold a boat they planned to live on and are looking for a home on land in Exuma. They hope to find a home with water access and a boat dock while staying within their budget.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: Heaven on Exuma
programme.desc: An Atlanta couple felt they had found heaven the moment they stepped foot on the Exumas. They agree that they want to own a small piece of the island paradise, but they can't agree on exactly what they want in a home there.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: Turn Key in Treasure Cay
programme.desc: After over a decade of renting and staying with friends in Treasure Cay, Sandy and Rande feel it is finally time to lay down roots in their Bahamian home away from home.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: Give and Take in Nassau
programme.desc: A couple looking to escape cold Canadian winters has to compromise to find their perfect Bahamian retreat in Nassau. He wants a quiet, secluded home with a dock for his boat while she has her eye on a beach condo in the heart of the action.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: Nassau Newlyweds

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and Mysterious Rituals
programme.desc: Throughout the world, ancient rites and rituals are believed to connect humans to another dimension. Take a look at whether aliens could be the origin of these rituals.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Mysterious Places
programme.desc: The Bermuda Triangle, Mexico's Zone of Silence, and Peru's Puerto de Hay Marko are some of the most mysterious places on Earth. Inexplicably, UFOs are often sited near these mystical areas.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Da Vinci Conspiracy
programme.desc: An examination into Leonardo Da Vinci's masterful paintings, highly technical hand-drawn sketches, and private journals.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Mysteries of the Sphinx

programme.desc: Many believe we have entered a new pyramid era with the discovery of hidden pyramids in Egypt and Central America.

programme.desc: The home invasion murder of a young mother in Oklahoma launches an investigation that reveals a vengeful romance and a murder conspiracy rooted in obsession and greed.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Down the Back Staircase
programme.desc: It all began when a bestselling author found his wife at the base of the stairs. Was this a fall or was it a crime? The story made headlines and we've been covering it for more than a decade. Here, Michael Peterson answers our questions.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets on Hot Springs Drive
programme.desc: A woman is murdered in a home invasion. Then, her best friend and neighbor is shot the following night. Investigators unearth disturbing secrets that suggest the cases may be linked.

programme.title: Dateline: The Plot Thickens
programme.desc: Hollywood stuntman, Garrett Warren, was shot four times but luckily survived. With many suspects in mind, see if Warren knew who was trying to kill him.

programme.title: Dateline: The Client
programme.desc: Andrea Canning reports on a realtor from Little Rock, Arkansas who goes missing after showing a house. The search leads detectives on a gripping chase.

programme.title: Dateline: Unspeakable
programme.desc: A couple's anniversary celebration ends in murder in what appears to be a home invasion. Investigators think the suspect is much closer to the victim.

programme.title: Snapped: Ann Trexler

programme.title: The Disappearance of Phoenix Coldon: Who Is She
programme.desc: Phoenix Coldons' parents are desperate for answers in the 2011 disappearance of their 23-year-old daughter. Her case is turned upside down when investigators uncover evidence of a secret life that may have introduced her to danger.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Phoenix Coldon: Where Is She
programme.desc: Joe and Shawndrea follow up on a handful of "Phoenix sightings," since her disappearance and begin to question whether she'd been lured into a new life more dangerous than she could have anticipated. A surprising lead takes us to an unexpected locale.

programme.title: Up and Vanished: Tara Grinstead
programme.desc: High school teacher Tara Grinstead is missing for over a decade when podcaster Payne Lindsey begins to investigate helping lead to the arrest of two former students. When they plead not guilty, Payne's team heads back to Georgia to crack the case.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Knock at the Door
programme.desc: Tara Ord was a beautiful young woman with big dreams. Then suddenly she vanished. With little evidence to go on, it would take years for determined cold case detectives to uncover the long buried clue that blew this case wide open.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Michelle Young was married to her college sweetheart and pregnant with their second child when she was murdered. In the search for her killer, detectives uncovered a marriage riddled with secrets but cracking this complicated case took years.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Suspicion

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Buried Secrets

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Who Killed the Radio Star
programme.desc: Steven B. Williams was a DJ with a golden voice. Then he vanished. It was a mystery that stretched from California to Montana. The clue to it all was wrapped in napkin tucked in a cabinet hidden in a library.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Conspiracy

programme.title: Underground Marvels: World's Biggest Labyrinth
programme.desc: The world's biggest labyrinth is a 1,553-mile cave system that's home to some of history's darkest mysteries, and new discoveries at this strange place reveal the long-lost secrets of Nazi occupation, Soviet revolution, and Cold War subterfuge.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Volcano NYC
programme.desc: A massive plume of smoke suddenly erupts from the ground in Manhattan, and experts investigate if this terrifying event is evidence of a volcano waking up beneath the streets of New York City and if it's almost due to blow.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Aliens of Hell Highway
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a highway swarmed with snake-like creatures and an unexplained ooze, experts investigate the origins of these alien creatures; the latest tech reveals where they came from and their top-secret purpose.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien of the Amazon
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a strange, blob-like alien in the Amazon jungle, some experts suspect that the origins of this monster are stranger-than-fiction; using cutting-edge science, investigators try to explain this bizarre beast.

programme.desc: Investigations into strange occurrences caught on camera.

programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a highway swarmed with snake-like creatures and an unexplained ooze, experts investigate the origins of these alien creatures; the latest tech reveals where they came from and their top-secret purpose.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Lost Colony of Roanoke
programme.desc: The Roanoke colony vanished without a trace, and centuries later, it remains one of history's greatest unsolved mysteries. But new evidence might at last reveal its fate. After a man is swallowed by the earth, experts wonder if a sinkhole is to blame.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Ghost Ship of the Desert
programme.desc: After a huge cargo ship suddenly vanishes with 27 crew members on board, new evidence suggests the culprit may be a mythical rogue wave. Plus, recently discovered evidence may prove the existence of a ghost ship in the Californian desert.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Atlantis: The Lost Evidence
programme.desc: Atlantis is one of the most famous disappearances of all time. After thousands of years, state-of-the-art technology might finally be able to crack this ancient mystery. And after nine hikers die in a gruesome cold case, new science provides a hot lead.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: The Men Who Beat Alcatraz
programme.desc: In 1962, three convicts attempt the impossible and escape from Alcatraz prison. Officials believe the men drowned, but a new scientific experiment suggests they made it to shore.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Flight of Terror
programme.desc: In 2009, an Air France flight going missing and investigators discover this tragedy could happen again. After a huge area of Siberian forest is destroyed, investigators race to find the culprit. New evidence might finally solve this century-old mystery.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Forbidden City of Gold
programme.desc: New technology reveals lost cities in inhospitable jungle, and researchers wonder if the mythical city of El Dorado could be the next discovery. After a crystal is found on a shipwreck, experts believe it could prove how the Vikings discovered America.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: After five planes vanish in the Bermuda Triangle, new science suggests a strange geological force is responsible. Today, satellites are revealing lost tribes living in the Amazon jungle, but some civilizations remain missing, stumping experts.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: Boston's Unsolved Art Heist
programme.desc: Christof investigates the robbery of the Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum, the largest art heist in history. In pursuit of the stolen masterpieces, he follows leads from dangerous members of organized crime that take him from Boston to Florida and France.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: Butch Cassidy's Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Christof uncovers new clues about the true fate of outlaws Butch Cassidy and the Sundance Kid. He travels to the highlands of Bolivia and the mountains of Utah to dig up evidence that may finally solve this 100-year-old mystery.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Black Dahlia Murder
programme.desc: Christof digs into the most infamous -- and gruesome -- unsolved murder case in Los Angeles history. He uncovers an investigation derailed by corruption and finds a confession pointing him to a new suspect in the Philippines.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Axeman of New Orleans
programme.desc: A century ago, New Orleans was terrorized by an axe murderer. Now Christof discovers new leads that could point to some of the earliest mafia hits. This gruesome crime spree takes him from the Big Easy to Sicily and Los Angeles.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Hunt for D.B. Cooper
programme.desc: Christof jumps from a plane and digs up rare FBI files as he follows shocking new leads that take him from the Pacific Northwest to Las Vegas and Utah in his quest to find the real identity of hijacker D.B. Cooper.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: Escape From Alcatraz
programme.desc: Three prisoners escaped from Alcatraz in 1962. Officially, they died in the surrounding waters, but FBI files say otherwise. Christof Putzel braves those same waters to hunt down inside information before going on a manhunt to Brazil.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: I Will Find You
programme.desc: 19-year-old Ali Kemp was at a pool in Leawood, Kansas in June 2002 when her father found her body in the pool's pump room. News reports and interviews with investigators and family tell the story of a father's quest to find his daughter's killer.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Knew What He Was
programme.desc: Ronald and Patty had always seen the signs that their older brother, Bernard Eugene Giles, had a darker side. When Gene finally lets loose the monster lurking inside, they couldn't help but wonder how things had gone so wrong.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Poisoned by Love
programme.desc: Norma Hawkins grew up in fear of her mother, Shirley Allen. For years, Norma watched in horror while Shirley's anger destroyed those closest to her. But when people started dying, Norma had to find the courage to turn in her own mother to police.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Let Her Rot
programme.desc: When Joshua Hudnall went off to war, he felt more at home in combat than he ever did around his mother. Just when Joshua thought he had escaped her torment, she set her sights on someone else, and destroyed their family from within.

programme.title: Devil Among Us: Trail of Blood
programme.desc: Nancy and her children are found dead in an apparent murder-suicide. Fifteen years later, Donna falls to her death in the Grand Canyon. But investigators discover they're linked and are confronted by a serial killer who's been lying in wait for decades.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: Murder on His Mind
programme.desc: A young Iowa man is shot dead while he sleeps peacefully next to his fiancée. Investigators wonder how she remained unharmed, and suspicion quickly swirls around her and two of her ex-boyfriends.

programme.title: American Monster: Once a Princess
programme.desc: Hyrah Frasch is no ordinary baby. The photogenic one-year-old already has her own website and looks set to become an internet sensation. But when a tragic accident occurs in the family swimming pool, police discover a brutal killer hiding in her midst.

programme.title: Devil Among Us: Trail of Blood
programme.desc: Nancy and her children are found dead in an apparent murder-suicide. Fifteen years later, Donna falls to her death in the Grand Canyon. But investigators discover they're linked and are confronted by a serial killer who's been lying in wait for decades.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: Murder on His Mind
programme.desc: A young Iowa man is shot dead while he sleeps peacefully next to his fiancée. Investigators wonder how she remained unharmed, and suspicion quickly swirls around her and two of her ex-boyfriends.

programme.title: American Monster: Life of the Party
programme.desc: Doug and Rose quickly strike up a romance and later marry. But behind the perfect façade seen in these exclusive home videos, lies and deceit begin to surface. A no show at Thanksgiving and a box on the roadside lead to a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Knew What He Was
programme.desc: Ronald and Patty had always seen the signs that their older brother, Bernard Eugene Giles, had a darker side. When Gene finally lets loose the monster lurking inside, they couldn't help but wonder how things had gone so wrong.

programme.title: Predator at Large: Such a Pretty Girl
programme.desc: Thirteen-year-old Carrie Jopek has disappeared. For her terrified friends and family, she seems to have vanished into thin air. But soon after, her body is found underneath a neighbour's porch -- which sets off a hunt for her killer that spans decades.

programme.title: Predator at Large: It Was A Thrill To Him
programme.desc: Women are bring murdered in Washington County, Oregon. A serial killer is one step ahead of the police. The community lives in fear. But only after more bloodshed do residents discover that the brutal killer has been living in plain sight all along.

programme.title: Deadly Women: The Blame Game
programme.desc: Some women can't admit their failings. They point the finger of blame at others.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Unspeakable Acts
programme.desc: Greed and lust drove these deadly women to unspeakable acts.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lethal Vengeance
programme.desc: Revenge is one of the oldest motives for murder. But these cases are much more than an 'eye for an eye'. For some women, the insatiable quest for retribution grows wildly out of proportion to the point where they methodically seek Lethal Vengence.

programme.title: Deadly Women: If Looks Could Kill
programme.desc: Beauty is only skin deep; scratch the surface and you could find an ugly soul. A gorgeous girl preys on an elderly man, a cabaret star performs a killer finale, and a farmer's wife harvests husbands.

programme.title: Deadly Women: No Good Reason
programme.desc: Hear stories of deadly women who had no real motive for killing their victims.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love Sick
programme.desc: Daphne Abdela, Lisa Michelle Lambert and Sarah Kolb appear to be baby-faced schoolgirls, but don't be deceived. When they thought someone was after their boyfriends, they became cold-blooded killers.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Loveless
programme.desc: There are many ways to leave your lover one of those ways is dead.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: An Officer, Not a Gentleman
programme.desc: A Filipino woman falls for a married US Navy Officer who will do anything to keep his mistress and his money.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Living in Sin
programme.desc: A Christian woman's faith is tested when she falls in love with a charming new female co-worker. As the forbidden lovers fight for their love in a community that doesn't want them, the pressure proves too much, and the consequences are deadly.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: The Book of James
programme.desc: An affair between a married pastor and a member of his flock takes a shocking turn when he proposes a polygamous relationship with his wife. But an unexpected arrival threatens their pledge of secrecy.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Love Is War
programme.desc: A decorated marine faces war at home when he falls for a married woman. Suspicion and jealousy plague their affair as they battle to keep their secret from their spouses but with the stakes so high it's a truth they'll stop at nothing to hide.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Making America
programme.desc: We all know of George Washington, the California Gold Rush, the vast highways that stretch across America, and the wars between the United States and Great Britain. Learn about the secrets behind the making of America.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Paranoia
programme.desc: As the propaganda war and the arms race rage on, the 1950's becomes the decade of paranoia. The stalemate between democracy and communism reaches a fever pitch as the world descends further in chaos.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Revolution
programme.desc: A look at how Russia sealed themselves behind an Iron Curtain, a move that spawned the birth of revolutions across East Europe and beyond.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Rise of the Superpowers
programme.desc: For four decades ago, two global superpowers faced off, threatening to annihilate one another with the push of a button. It is an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Peace and War
programme.desc: By the mid 1970s, the Cold War has remained a fact of life for decades. But 30 years into the war, and the doctrine of mutually assured destruction doesn't feel like a roadmap to peace. It's an arms race, a propaganda and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Revolution
programme.desc: A look at how Russia sealed themselves behind an Iron Curtain, a move that spawned the birth of revolutions across East Europe and beyond.

programme.desc: By the mid 1970s, the Cold War has remained a fact of life for decades. But 30 years into the war, and the doctrine of mutually assured destruction doesn't feel like a roadmap to peace. It's an arms race, a propaganda and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Vessels
programme.desc: This episode ranks the most iconic vessels of warfare of the last century. Featuring the German U-Boat, the Nimitz Aircraft Carriers, and the world's most successful battleship, these vessels have changed the face of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles
programme.desc: With incredible archive from the heart of the action, and interviews with world-leading historians, this action-packed episode counts down the most decisive battles of warfare that have been caught on camera.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Aircraft
programme.desc: Find out about aircraft important to conflicts in the 20th and 21st centuries.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Inventions
programme.desc: From the mass production of life-saving Penicillin and pioneering Plastic Surgery, to the development of the Internet and GPS, this episode uses rare archive footage and expert interviews to identify and rank the most influential inventions of warfare.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Pretty Boy Floyd
programme.desc: Notorious criminal 'Pretty Boy' Floyd was involved in over 30 bank robberies and perhaps as many as 20 murders.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Al Capone
programme.desc: Al Capone is America's best known gangster and perhaps the single greatest symbol of the collapse of law and order in the United States during the Prohibition era of the 1920s. The FBI branded the bootlegging kingpin America's 'Public Enemy #1.'

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Beirut Bomb
programme.desc: The true story of how CIA Director William Casey allegedly sanctioned an off-the-books assassination attempt on Sheikh Mohammed Fadlallah in Beirut in 1985. Casey was convinced Fadlallah was the head of Hezbollah and behind a series of terrorist attacks.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Operation Celestial Balance
programme.desc: In 1998 the bombers of the US Embassy in Nairobi started a trail of destruction that the CIA had to stop. It's Al Qaeda's first attack. The trail leads to Somalia and Mogadishu. The CIA bribes warlords and use drones to track and kill an untried man.

programme.desc: A couple that moved from Hawaii to take care of a family member in Texas wants to recreate their outdoor lanai lifestyle. Justin McGuire and Steve Terry must use everything they have to turn their rocky Austin hilltop into a tropical paradise.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Three Rivers and a Pool
programme.desc: A couple want an alluring yard that incorporates the beauty of their cliff-side property. The enlarged yard area gets a deck bisected by a faux stream, a feature-filled pool with stone slab bridge, jumping boulders and even a slide.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Green With Envy
programme.desc: Lucas and the crew have their work cut out for them as a client's demands leave him reluctant. A Caribbean destination that includes green rocks and a sand bottom salt-water pool is the client's request.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Growing Pains
programme.desc: A couple hires Lucas to take their outdated pool and remodel so it's safe for their baby boy. The hope is that the dull patio pool will be transformed into a stunning natural atrium.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Living Under the Sea
programme.desc: Pool designer Lucas Congdon must create an outdoor water room in which a mermaid could live. Former clients in love with all things ocean ask Lucas to remodel the tiny pool in their new home that sits just yards away from the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Water You Waiting For?
programme.desc: It has been a long time coming for these families to finally build their dream pools.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: From Mild to Wild
programme.desc: Lucas delivers the most epic pool he's ever built. Put to the ultimate test, he transforms an ordinary backyard into two different pools complete with an 8.5ft high spa, his first fire feature inside a grotto and a treehouse with a theme park sized slide.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End
programme.desc: Lucas Congdon and his team at Lucas Lagoons build custom pools and gardens.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: From Mild to Wild
programme.desc: Lucas delivers the most epic pool he's ever built. Put to the ultimate test, he transforms an ordinary backyard into two different pools complete with an 8.5ft high spa, his first fire feature inside a grotto and a treehouse with a theme park sized slide.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Living Under the Sea
programme.desc: Pool designer Lucas Congdon must create an outdoor water room in which a mermaid could live. Former clients in love with all things ocean ask Lucas to remodel the tiny pool in their new home that sits just yards away from the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Hidden Gold: House of Champions
programme.desc: Eric and the crew bank on kerosene switch lamps to light up profits. If not, an antique icebox called the Vermonter might bring in some cold hard cash. It's a tough job, but Larry Bird makes an appearance and helps bail the guys out of the red.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Blacksburg Barn
programme.desc: The dawgs head to Blacksburg, Virginia, to salvage an 1800s barn with an internal log structure. It should be an easy job, but a hurricane on the horizon means a tighter deadline to make it out before the storm arrives.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Bluefield House
programme.desc: The crew deliver a large lamppost that will serve as the focal point of a new community space. Before taking on this project, the team visits the Bluefield House in West Virginia to find classic commodities needed to restock the warehouse.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Lexington Storefront
programme.desc: The crew take a stab at a refurbished storefront in historic downtown Lexington, Virginia. This second-generation salvage requires a lot of finesse, as the building is being renovated rather than destroyed. Windowpanes become a room divider.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Alexandria Church
programme.desc: The crew go to salvage a church where they must save everything from contemporary pews to a commercial grade sink. However, the team must get creative as they are met with heights, narrow hallways and perplexing waterlines.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Barnesville House
programme.desc: The dawgs tackle Ohio's cold and snowy winter to salvage an old Italiante house that's beaming with character. Back in the shop, things heat up as Tay comes up with a plan to use old pulleys as the legs for a unique table.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return to Barnesville
programme.desc: The crew pick through a barn and take on a Queen Anne-style home in Barnesville, Ohio, looking for some bonus finds. Mike Whiteside meets with a return client who has an idea for a dining table set made from canning baskets and live edge wood.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Dayton Mill Power Plant
programme.desc: The team organizes a dawg vs. dawg build competition after Mike and Robert get a tip on an abandoned power plant from an old client in South Carolina. The winner of the contest is a tough call as both teams' pieces are rooted in the original aesthetic.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Baltimore Fireboat
programme.desc: After a call from their old friend, Captain Tim, the crew travels to Norfolk, Virginia, to salvage a fireboat from Baltimore. When they return to the shop, Mike and Tay enlist the help of a local coppersmith to fashion unique foot baths for Hotel Roanoke.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Supersizing in St. Petersburg, Florida
programme.desc: A newly engaged couple loves their Florida lifestyle and desires to be on the water in St. Petersburg, which means they must take on a renovation project.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: North Carolina Renewal
programme.desc: After a recent medical scare, Nicole is ready to live life to the fullest in a home by the water in Moorehead City, NC.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Texas-Sized Renovation On South Padre Island
programme.desc: A couple and their four kids are looking for a vacation retreat on South Padre Island in Texas. After recently renovating a rental property in the area, they've decided they are ready to get their hands dirty again.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Coastal Cottage in Hampton, Virginia
programme.desc: A couple that dreams of raising their two sons along the shores of Hampton, Virginia, finds a waterfront property in need of serious updating.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Three's Company on the Gulf Coast
programme.desc: A family searches for a beach retreat in Gulf Shores, AL. While they have different opinions on what type of house they should get, they all agree they want to live near the beach.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Chesapeake Beach Build
programme.desc: A couple looks for a beach retreat in Chesapeake Beach, Maryland, where they can escape the daily hustle and bustle and relax with their six-year-old son.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: #throwback
programme.desc: We're talking about throwback dishes that are better now than ever before.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Voted "Most Popular"
programme.desc: We're sharing seven of the most popular go-to dishes from restaurants across the country.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Stretchy Pants Required
programme.desc: America's best dishes just might burst your buttons. Anne Burrell faces off against a gut-busting club sandwich from Little Goat Diner in Chicago while Antonia Lofaso ventures to the heart of Los Angeles for heavy-hitting Korean barbecue at Park's BBQ.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On a Date
programme.desc: Birds are chirping, flowers are blooming, bellies are full and love is in the air. Celebrate the best meals for any romantic occasion. Alex Guarnaschelli wines and dines with the most amazing gnocchi ever made in New York City.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Get Him to the Greek Pizza
programme.desc: Noah Cappe's first stop is The Big Butler Fair in Butler, Penn., where he dines on a Euro-fusion Greek pizza, a crabby patty burger and a deep-fried chili dog, before finally tasting a fluffernutter elephant ear pasty.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Rainbow Confection
programme.desc: Noah Cappe lands at the LA County Fair in Pomona, Calif. for some sunny west coast eats, like the jackfruit torta, PB meatballs and cherry candy-coated cherry punch hot wings. Finally, Noah takes a tasty stroll through the rainbow Ice Cream Garden.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Grillers in the Mist
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to New York for the Long Island Fun Fest and some Empire State eats. He can't resist a pizza covered in gooey penne alla vodka or a fancy Hamptons Dog, and he also tries the ultimate Italian-American combo, a Cannoli Calzone.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: My Fair Latte
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts off in Chippewa Falls, Wis., at the Northern Wisconsin State Fair. The Wisconsin woods are the inspiration for the loaded Campfire Burger, and the state's famous cheese curds make an appearance in the Hot Chick.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: 50 Shades of Crepe
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Vancouver to sample some amazing eats, like the truly Canadian poutine stuffed burger, shrimp fried rice Balls, jerk chicken dumplings, and the Donuccino, a meal and a milkshake all in one.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Piefidelity
programme.desc: Noah Cappe knows where to find amazing fresh seafood at the Delaware State Fair in Harrington.

programme.title: Fire Masters: Holy Smokes
